articles.title: Stars Shine in Fancy Clothes at the Oscars
articles.summary: The Oscars is a big awards show in Los Angeles where movie stars wear beautiful and stylish clothes on the red carpet. Famous actors like Chase Infiniti, Rose Byrne, and Emma Stone showed off their outfits. They wore dresses from top fashion brands like Louis Vuitton, Dior, and Chanel. Some stars changed into different dresses for the after party. The article shares pictures and talks about the fashion choices, making it fun to see what everyone wore. It's like a big fashion show for Hollywood celebrities.

articles.title: Funny Moments at the Oscars Awards Show
articles.summary: The Oscars is a big awards show for movies in Hollywood. At the 98th Academy Awards, there were many exciting moments. Timothée Chalamet, an actor, lost the best actor award to Michael B Jordan. Host Conan O'Brien made jokes about Chalamet, saying he upset ballet and opera fans. Chalamet smiled with his girlfriend Kylie Jenner. O'Brien later said they were just having fun. The show had tight security because of world events. Backstage, winners celebrated with their Oscars, and there was a tie in one category. This article shares what happened behind the scenes that TV viewers didn't see.

articles.title: The Exciting Oscars Night with Big Wins and Firsts
articles.summary: The 2026 Oscars was a fun and surprising night for movies. It had big wins, emotional speeches, and funny moments. The movie One Battle After Another won the most awards, including best picture. Jessie Buckley made history by becoming the first Irish star to win best actress. Michael B Jordan won best actor, which is special because he is the sixth black actor to win in almost 100 years. People watched the show to see stars and celebrate movies. The Oscars is a big event in Hollywood where actors and movies get awards. It happens every year and is broadcast on TV for everyone to enjoy.

articles.title: AI Helps People Be More Creative
articles.summary: Scientists found that AI can help people be more creative, not just do work faster. In a study, over 800 people used an AI system to design virtual cars. The AI showed many different car ideas, including good ones, weird ones, and even bad ones. This made people spend more time designing, create better cars, and feel more excited. The researchers say AI should be seen as a creative partner that encourages exploration and new ideas. They think AI can help in fields like art and engineering by making humans more creative and collaborative.

articles.title: THOR AI Solves a Tough Physics Puzzle Fast
articles.summary: Scientists at The University of New Mexico and Los Alamos National Laboratory have created a new computer tool called THOR AI. This tool helps solve a very hard physics problem that has been around for 100 years. The problem is about understanding how materials behave, like metals or gases, by doing big math calculations. Before, these calculations took a long time, even weeks, and were not always accurate. THOR AI uses smart math tricks to break the big problem into smaller pieces, making it much faster. It can now solve these calculations in just seconds! This helps scientists learn more about materials quickly, which is important for making better things like stronger metals or new materials. The tool was tested on materials like copper and argon, and it worked very well, being over 400 times faster than old methods. This breakthrough could help in many areas like science and engineering.

articles.title: Jannik Sinner Wins Big Tennis Trophy at Indian Wells
articles.summary: Jannik Sinner is a tennis player who just won a big tournament called Indian Wells in California. He beat Daniil Medvedev in the final match. Sinner is 24 years old and has won many important tennis events on hard courts, like the Australian Open and US Open. He also won all the Masters 1,000 titles on hard courts and the ATP Finals. Only two other famous players, Novak Djokovic and Roger Federer, have done this before. Sinner said he worked hard to prepare for this tournament and is happy about his achievement. He will now play in another tournament in Miami. This win shows he is one of the best tennis players in the world.
